title: chromolaena integrifolia
intro: Chromolaena integrifolia, also known as Eupatorium in the United States and known as Lantana in some parts, is a flowering plant native to Central and South America. The leaves and flowers of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. Consuming Chromolaena integrifolia has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as an antacid. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular herbal remedy in many parts of the world, particularly in traditional medicine practices.
